description: South Korea's leading semiconductor packaging equipment manufacturer. World #1 in HBM TC (Thermocompression) bonders with 71.2% global market share. Key products include TC bonders for HBM production, MSVP (Micro Saw & Vision Placement) package singulation systems, and flip chip bonders. Founded 1980.

majorClients: SK Hynix (CMP-0020, TC bonders for HBM)
_externalRelationships.notes: FY2024 revenue: 576.7B KRW (record high). Operating margin 43.6%. 76%+ export ratio. Selected by TechInsights as only Korean company in global top 10 semiconductor equipment firms (2025). MSVP package cutting systems compete with ACCRETECH dicing in back-end packaging. Recently shipped Big Die flip chip bonders to ASE.
